charter_objective: Construct a Chapter 1 of the graphite anode ICA/DVA dynamics document via continuous chemical potential distribution rho(mu;q,T), continuous reactivity kernel S_R(mu;T), and the user's PhD-level Fredholm 2nd kind ratio-substitution method (Refs.6,7+JCP2017) as the canonical solver for the resulting self-consistent integral equation.

forbidden_patterns.pattern: max(.,0) or Heaviside(.) in definitional eq
discretization of mu without basis-expansion derivation
single-state simplification of rho without explicit moment projection

smooth_limit_rules.charter_compliant: OK iff continuous reactivity kernel construction guarantees DeltaG_eff >= 0 in physical domain

audit_dim_11.pass_1_procedure: Scan document for ASCII keywords (max(, min(, clip(, step(, Heaviside(, sign(, softplus(, relu(), LaTeX commands (\max, \min, \Theta, \operatorname{sgn}, sigmoid, \tanh, erf, erfc), and equation patterns (1/(1+exp(...)), discrete N_p sums). Record file, line, eq label, 5-line context.
audit_dim_11.pass_2_procedure: Classify each Pass 1 occurrence: FAIL-definitional (must remove), WARN-regularization-with-smooth-limit (allowed with §5 clause), WARN-empirical-with-disclaimer (allowed), OK-derived (allowed with derivation traceability).
audit_dim_11.pass_3_procedure: Confirm FAIL occurrences removed or reclassified. Confirm WARN occurrences have explicit smooth-limit clause / disclaimer / derivation. Confirm OK occurrences trace to canonical variables.
audit_dim_11.reporting_format: Phase Result must contain Dim #11 table: phase, Pass 1 count, Pass 2 FAIL count, Pass 2 WARN count, Pass 2 OK count, Pass 3 remaining FAIL (must be 0).

canonical.description: Continuous distribution density at chemical potential mu
Internal anode potential, implicit solution of charge balance
Driving potential, V_{n,app} in reduced model

derived.derivation: (1/N_j) * integral over peak_j window of rho(mu;q,t) dmu
(1/N_j) * integral over peak_j window of rho_eq(mu;q,T) dmu
center of rho_eq(mu) peak window j
FWHM of rho_eq(mu) peak window j
integral over peak_j window of rho_eq(mu;q,T) integrated over discharge range
V_n evaluated under rho = rho_eq (boundary of equilibrium distribution)

central_equations.eq_48_charge_balance: Q_{\cell} q = Q_{\bg}(V_n, T) + integral from mu_min to mu_max of d mu rho(mu; q, T) n(mu)
central_equations.eq_49_fredholm_evolution: rho(mu; q, t) = rho_0(mu; q, t) + integral from mu_min to mu_max of d mu' K_n(mu, mu'; q, T) S_R(mu'; T) [rho_eq(mu'; q, T) - rho(mu'; q, t)]

ref_6.title: Communication: Propagator for diffusive dynamics of an interacting molecular pair

ref_7.title: An accurate expression for the rates of diffusion-influenced bimolecular reactions with long-range reactivity

ref_6_7_application.rho_simple_candidate: rho_eq(mu; q, T) evaluated under V_n = V_{n,OCV}(q, T) legacy assumption (analog of JCP 2017 delta-function-sink solution)
ref_6_7_application.ratio_substitution_form: rho(mu_1; q, t) / rho(mu; q, t) approx rho_simple(mu_1; q, T) / rho_simple(mu; q, T)
validity_conditions: Low C-rate (analog of small K external field)
Large characteristic chemical potential scale (analog of large Onsager distance r_c)
Small reactivity magnitude (analog of small sigma^3 phi / D)
Continuous reactivity kernel S_R(mu) smooth in mu (NEW condition from continuous-form rebuild)

dim_11_system_fidelity.note: Only §5.1 softplus example, classified WARN with explicit smooth-limit clause. Charter equations in §3.2, §8.1, §8.2, §9.3 are AP/FB-free.

gates.requirement: Allowed-pattern includes new namespace + central eq form
Central equations valid LaTeX + dimensional + smooth-limit check
gates.note: Eq. 49 unit reconciliation deferred to Phase E6

open_issues.item: Eq. 49 unit reconciliation deferred to Phase E6
